description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof, featuring a mix of brick and white geometric facade elements. The front is adorned with lush greenery, including trees and shrubs, and a small entry path leads to a recessed main door. Large windows are present on both floors, allowing ample natural light into the interior spaces. The backyard includes a circular outdoor seating area, a palm tree, and a small lawn, all enclosed by hedges for privacy. The side elevations are mostly brick with minimal window openings, emphasizing privacy and a clean, rectilinear form. The overall design is contemporary, with a focus on outdoor living and integration of natural elements.
description: A modern two-story brick house with a flat roof, large windows, and lush landscaping in both front and back yards.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, geometric white facade, and dense greenery with a pathway leading to the door.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the solid brick wall, minimal windows, and the extension of the backyard with hedges and a circular seating area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard with a palm tree, circular seating, and large windows opening to the garden.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the brick wall, white geometric entry feature, and additional greenery along the side.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main door with geometric white facade, steps, and lush landscaping at the front
